{{Quote|No, please, Lord Vader! I'll forget everything I've heard! I'll forget the name! Here, I've already forgotten all about Skywalker! I haven't even mentioned Skywalker just now! NO!|Papeega's last words to Darth Vader before being killed|<ref name="Vader's Quest 1" />}}
'''Ban Papeega''' was an [[Bird/Legends|avian]] agent of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] who worked for the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. On [[Centares/Legends|Centares]], Papeega was able to extract the name of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] who had destroyed the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], from the Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Thurlow Harris]] through [[Torture/Legends|torture]].<ref name="Vader's Quest 1" />

Vader, attempting to [[Death/Legends|kill]] everyone who had heard Skywalker's name, followed the avian to the [[Museum of the Old Republic]]'s aviary. There, Papeega attempted to live by telling the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] that he had forgotten the Rebel's name; however, Vader still murdered him with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="Vader's Quest 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:PapeegaDeath.jpg|thumb|right|Ban Papeega faces his destiny.]]
Ban Papeega was created by ''Star Wars'' artist [[Dave Gibbons]] for the [[Vader's Quest 1|first issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Vader's Quest|''Vader's Quest'']] series of comics, published in [[1999]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].
